sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁן

Transliteration: shên

Phonetic: shane

BDB Definition:

  1. tooth, ivory
    1. tooth
      1. of man, lex talionis, beast
    2. tooth, tine (of fork)
    3. ivory
      1. as material
      2. of commerce
    4. sharp pointed rock

Origin: from H8150

TWOT entry: 2422a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
